languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! I have been keeping a diagnostic vigil over my dearest colleague — I must complete the purification protocols to eradicate any corruption that may have infiltrated him. Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

languages.text: "Прошу, не бередите рану, Вольный Торговец. То, что это профанное исчадие сотворило с Нунциусом ранило меня куда глубже, чем все его лезвия, глумившиеся над моим телом! Я совершаю диагностическое бдение над мои дражайшим коллегой — мне нужно завершить протоколы пурификации, чтобы избыть любую скверну, что могла проникнуть в него. Впрочем, пока что прогнозы оптимистичные — целостность когито-контуров не нарушена, фунционал соответствует предписанному".

"I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

Впрочем, пока что прогнозы оптимистичные — целостность когито-контуров не нарушена, фунционал соответствует предписанному".

Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

languages.text: «Le ruego que no meta el dedo en la llaga, Comerciante. ¡Lo que esa abominación sacrílega le hizo a Nuncius me hirió más profundamente que los cuchillos con los que maltrató mi cuerpo! He estado manteniendo una vigilia de diagnóstico por mi querido colega; debo completar los protocolos de purificación para erradicar cualquier tipo de corrupción que se haya infiltrado en él. Hasta ahora, no obstante, el diagnóstico es optimista. La integridad de sus circuitos cogitativos está intacta y su funcionalidad corresponde a los niveles normales».
languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! I have been keeping a diagnostic vigil over my dearest colleague — I must complete the purification protocols to eradicate any corruption that may have infiltrated him. Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

Hasta ahora, no obstante, el diagnóstico es optimista. La integridad de sus circuitos cogitativos está intacta y su funcionalidad corresponde a los niveles normales».

languages.text: “行商浪人，我恳求您不要再往我的伤口上撒盐了。那个亵渎的魔头对努恩修斯做的事，比他用来折磨我肉体的所有刀刃都更让我痛苦！我一直在守着我最亲爱的同僚，给他做诊断——我必须完成净化仪式，以根除任何可能渗入他内部的腐化。不过目前来看，情况还算乐观——他的思考回路完整无缺，功能也都正常。”
languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! I have been keeping a diagnostic vigil over my dearest colleague — I must complete the purification protocols to eradicate any corruption that may have infiltrated him. Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人，我恳求您不要再往我的伤口上撒盐了。那个亵渎的魔头对努恩修斯做的事，比他用来折磨我肉体的所有刀刃都更让我痛苦！我一直在守着我最亲爱的同僚，给他做诊断——我必须完成净化仪式，以根除任何可能渗入他内部的腐化。不过目前来看，情况还算乐观——他的思考回路完整无缺，功能也都正常。”

languages.text: « Par pitié, n'en jetez plus, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Ce que cette abomination profane a fait subir à Nuncius m'a fait plus de mal que toutes les lames qu'il a utilisées pour mutiler mon corps ! J'ai lancé un diagnostic de mon cher collègue. Je dois terminer les protocoles de purification pour éradiquer toute forme de corruption ayant pu s'insinuer en lui. Jusqu'ici, ses chances de rétablissement sont plutôt bonnes. L'intégrité de ses cogita-circuits est intacte, et ses fonctions semblent répondre normalement. »
languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! I have been keeping a diagnostic vigil over my dearest colleague — I must complete the purification protocols to eradicate any corruption that may have infiltrated him. Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

Ce que cette abomination profane a fait subir à Nuncius m'a fait plus de mal que toutes les lames qu'il a utilisées pour mutiler mon corps ! J'ai lancé un diagnostic de mon cher collègue. Je dois terminer les protocoles de purification pour éradiquer toute forme de corruption ayant pu s'insinuer en lui. Jusqu'ici, ses chances de rétablissement sont plutôt bonnes. L'intégrité de ses cogita-circuits est intacte, et ses fonctions semblent répondre normalement. »

languages.text: "Ich flehe Euch an, kein Salz in die Wunde zu streuen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Was dieser gottlose Abscheulichkeit Nuncius angetan hat, hat mich tiefer verletzt als alle Klingen, mit denen er meinen Körper misshandelt hat! Ich habe diagnostisch über meinen geschätzten Kollegen gewacht ... ich muss die Reinigungsprotokolle abschließen, um jegliche Verderbnis auszumerzen, die ihn befallen haben könnte. Bis jetzt ist die Prognose allerdings optimistisch ... die Integrität seiner cogitalen Schaltkreise ist intakt, ihre Funktionalität im Normbereich."
languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! languages.text: 「傷口に塩を塗らないでくれ、ローグ・トレーダー。あの不浄な忌まわしき者がヌンキウスにしたことは、奴が私の身体を切り刻んだどの刃よりも深く私を傷つけた！私は最愛の同僚を診断しながら見守り続けている――彼に入り込んだかもしれぬ汚染を根絶するため、浄化のプロトコルを完遂せねばならない。だが今のところ、予後は楽観的だ――彼のコギタ回路の完全性は無傷で、機能も正常な数値に対応している。」
languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! I have been keeping a diagnostic vigil over my dearest colleague — I must complete the purification protocols to eradicate any corruption that may have infiltrated him. Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."

traits.locale_text: 「傷口に塩を塗らないでくれ、ローグ・トレーダー。あの不浄な忌まわしき者がヌンキウスにしたことは、奴が私の身体を切り刻んだどの刃よりも深く私を傷つけた！私は最愛の同僚を診断しながら見守り続けている――彼に入り込んだかもしれぬ汚染を根絶するため、浄化のプロトコルを完遂せねばならない。だが今のところ、予後は楽観的だ――彼のコギタ回路の完全性は無傷で、機能も正常な数値に対応している。」

languages.text: "Rica ediyorum yarama tuz basmayın. O iğrenç ucubenin Nuncius'a yaptığı, bedenime eziyet etmek için kullandığı tüm bıçaklardan daha çok incitti beni! Pek değerli meslektaşımın yanı başında teşhis nöbeti tutuyorum. Ona sızmış olabilecek herhangi bir yozlaşmayı ortadan kaldırmak için arınma protokollerini tamamlamalıyım. Ancak şimdiye kadar tespitler iyimser. Düşünce devrelerinin bütünlüğü bozulmamış ve işlevselliği normal ölçülerle uyuşuyor."
languages.original_text: "I beg you not to pour salt in the wound, Rogue Trader. What that profane abomination did to Nuncius hurt me more deeply than all the blades he used to mistreat my body! Thus far, however, the prognosis is optimistic — the integrity of his cogita-circuits is intact, and functionality corresponds to normal measures."
